name: Avatar Korra -Alok
description:
My people... I'm not dead!

Hopefully this is a playing return from my stale consistency.

Sorry for not publishing a ton. I guess with so few interactions and followers, sometimes it feels litre, what's the point...

...

...

I HAVE LIKE, SIX CHARACTERS, WHAT AM I EXPECTING?

anyways. Hope you enjoy. I intend to update this bot soon. And hopefully, you'll hear from me more.
creator: Evan Parker
